expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Build notification center with read-state workflows.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification read-state persistence",
      "description": "As a system, I want store notification read state so it persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Notification persistence includes read state value and update timestamp.",
        "Existing notifications default to unread read state.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_notification_read_state.sql",
        "src/domain/notification.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add notification list and unread count query",
      "description": "As a user, I want notification list payload with unread count so UI can render list and badge.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Query returns notification list ordered by newest first with read-state metadata.",
        "Query returns unread count for current user.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/queries/listNotifications.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/notificationRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "dependsOn": [],
      "parallelBatch": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add mark read and unread server action",
      "description": "As a user, I want mark notifications read or unread so I can manage attention state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Server action updates notification read state for current user.",
        "Mark read and mark unread requests validate notification ownership.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/markNotificationReadState.ts",
        "src/server/repositories/notificationRepo.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-001"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show unread badge and notification list panel",
      "description": "As a user, I want unread badge and notification list panel so I can discover new notifications quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Header shows unread badge count from notification query.",
        "Notification center panel lists notifications with read-state indicators.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationBadge.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationCenterPanel.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add read-state filter controls for notification list",
      "description": "As a user, I want filter notifications by read state so I can focus on unread or archived items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Filter controls include all, unread, and read options.",
        "Selecting filter updates visible notification list without full page reload.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/ui/notifications/NotificationFilters.tsx",
        "src/ui/notifications/useFilteredNotifications.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-002"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add clear all read notifications flow",
      "description": "As a user, I want clear all read notifications so list stays focused on active items.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Clear-read action removes or archives only notifications already marked read.",
        "Notification center exposes clear read control and refreshes list after completion.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/clearReadNotifications.ts",
        "src/ui/notifications/ClearReadNotificationsButton.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "dependsOn": [
        "US-003"
      ],
      "parallelBatch": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
